prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科/物理类最低位次约22760→32081→30280→31182→48861，2025年因山西省首次实施新高考（物理类/历史类）导致位次体系重构，最低位次大幅后 移至约48861名，较2024年增加约17679名，波动剧烈；该校在山西省理科/物理类招生计划2021年81人、2022年72人、2023年79人、2024年76人、2025年70人， 呈逐年小幅缩减趋势；2026年计划68人，较2025年再减2人，连续缩招对竞争压力有推升作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 贵州大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名 从2021年第135名持续上升至2026年第85名，排名进步显著，学校综合实力和认可度稳步提升，对考生吸引力增强；2026年高考周期内声誉评价偏负面，主要因 管理岗招聘公告设置不当条件引发舆情，学校已终止招聘并致歉；抖音热度排名第76位（一般），短视频平台曝光量中等，未见明显报考关注升温信号；第五轮 学科评估中植物保护获评A-，为该校唯一A-及以上学科，与农学类、植物生产类招生专业直接关联，对相关专业报考有一定支撑。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电气类、电 子信息/通信等工科专业社会热度高热推荐，与该校物理类主力招生专业高度匹配；山西省2026年物理类考生约167419人，较2025年173347人减少约5928人（-3.4%），考生总量下 降缓和竞争；贵州大学位于贵州省贵阳市，距山西较远，属于跨省就读；该校在山西招生占比约2.5%–4.7%（2021–2025年），非 主要生源省份，地域偏好对报考影响中性。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年新高考过渡期位次大幅后移的基数效应、2026年物理类考生减少约3.4%的竞争缓和、软科排名持续上升的 吸引力增强，以及招生计划连续两年小幅缩减的推升作用，预计2026年最低位次较2025年有所前移；预测最低位次约47823名，区间47323–48323名。

- 电气工程及其自动化

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间47323–48323名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底；位次明显优于区间下限（<47323名）可重点冲刺计算机类、电气类等热门专业；位次接近区间上限（>48323名）应以三档保底专业为主，避免滑档风险。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science/physics category was approximately 22760 → 32081 → 30280 → 31182 → 48861. In 2025, due to Shanxi Province's first implementation of the new college entrance examination (physics category/history category), the ranking system was restructured, causing the minimum ranking to significantly drop to about 48861, an increase of approximately 17679 compared to 2024, with drastic fluctuations. The university's enrollment plan for science/physics category in Shanxi Province was 81 in 2021, 72 in 2022, 79 in 2023, 76 in 2024, and 70 in 2025, showing a gradual decreasing trend. The 2026 plan is 68, a reduction of 2 from 2025, and the consecutive enrollment reduction will increase competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Guizhou University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its ranking in the Shanghai Ranking's Best Chinese Universities has continuously risen from 135th in 2021 to 85th in 2026, showing significant progress. The university's comprehensive strength and recognition have steadily improved, enhancing its appeal to candidates. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly due to inappropriate conditions set in a management recruitment announcement that sparked public opinion; the university has terminated the recruitment and apologized. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 76th (average), with moderate exposure on short video platforms, and no clear signs of increased application interest. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Plant Protection received an A-, the only A- or above discipline at the university, directly related to agricultural and plant production majors, providing some support for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, and Electronic Information/Communication are highly recommended in society, closely matching the main enrollment majors in the university's physics category. In 2026, the number of physics category candidates in Shanxi Province is approximately 167,419, a decrease of about 5,928 (3.4%) from 173,347 in 2025, easing competition due to the decline in total candidates. Guizhou University is located in Guiyang City, Guizhou Province, far from Shanxi, making it a cross-province study option. The university's enrollment proportion in Shanxi is about 2.5%–4.7% (2021–2025), not a major source province, so regional preference has a neutral impact on applications.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the base effect of the significant ranking drop during the 2025 new college entrance examination transition period, the easing of competition due to a 3.4% decrease in physics category candidates in 2026, the increased attractiveness from the continuous rise in Shanghai Ranking, and the pushing effect of two consecutive years of slight enrollment reductions, it is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will move forward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 47,823, with a range of 47,323 to 48,323.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Computer Science (Computer Science and Technology, Information Security)
- Electrical Engineering and Automation
- Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Mathematics (Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Statistics)
- Internet of Things Engineering
- New Energy Science and Engineering
- Business Administration.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Civil Engineering (Civil Engineering, Building Environment and Energy Application Engineering)
- Mining Engineering (Mining Engineering, Mineral Processing Engineering)
- Tourism Management
- Forestry (Forestry, Forest Protection).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 47,323–48,323, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<47,323), you can focus on aiming for popular majors like Computer Science and Electrical Engineering. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>48,323), you should mainly rely on Tier 3 safety majors to avoid the risk of sliding.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts/history category was approximately 2209 → 2343 → 2575 → 4998 → 3513. In 2024, due to the adjustment of the examination mode (from liberal arts to history category), the ranking significantly dropped to about 4998, and in 2025 it rebounded to about 3513, showing large fluctuations in the past two years. The university's enrollment plan for liberal arts/history category in Shanxi Province was 10 students from 2021 to 2025 (9 in 2023), and the 2026 plan remains 10 students. The enrollment scale has been stable for a long time, having a neutral impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Guizhou University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its Soft Science ranking has continuously risen from 135th in 2021 to 85th in 2026, showing significant progress. The improvement in overall strength is also attractive to liberal arts candidates. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation is slightly negative (due to recruitment announcement public opinion), but it mainly involves management recruitment, with limited direct impact on undergraduate enrollment. Douyin popularity is average, with no obvious abnormal signals in application attention. Plant Protection (A-) is the only A- or above discipline at the university, which is not directly related to liberal arts enrollment majors. Liberal arts majors lack A-level discipline support, so their disciplinary competitiveness is relatively limited.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Liberal arts majors such as Law and Chinese Language and Literature have social popularity recommended for differentiation and observation, overall stable. In 2026, the number of history category candidates in Shanxi Province is about 63,113, a significant decrease of about 21,766 (-25.6%) compared to 84,879 in 2025. The total number of candidates has dropped significantly, easing competitive pressure. Guizhou University is located in Guizhou Province, far from Shanxi, requiring cross-province study. The university's enrollment proportion in Shanxi liberal arts is very small (about 0.2%–0.3%), so regional preference has limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the rebound trend of rankings in 2025, the significant reduction of about 25.6% in history category candidates in 2026 leading to a notable easing of competition, the long-term stability of the enrollment plan, and the positive effect of the continuously rising Soft Science ranking, it is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will further improve compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 3433, with a range of 2933–3933.

If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>3933), you should mainly rely on Tier 3 majors as a safety net.
